title: Power to tax
doc_html:
§61.  Power to tax

The districts herein created and the subdistricts which may be created shall have the power to tax but only as provided by this Chapter.  

Acts 1988, No. 688, §1, eff. July 15, 1988.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1988, NO. 688, §2.}}
